name: Election to Translate Foreign Taxes at Payment Date

eligibility.description: Available to taxpayers who take foreign income taxes into account when accrued, specifically for taxes denominated in a currency other than the taxpayer's functional currency.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can elect to translate foreign income taxes into dollars using the exchange rate at the time of payment rather than the average exchange rate for the year.
